title: Expose MCP read-only RepoBrief resources
goal: Expose existing snapshots through read-only MCP resources/tools after access/freshness/CLI are stable

acceptance.assertion: The slice is implemented or explicitly closed against current main/PR state with no hidden broadening.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: RepoBrief boundaries are preserved: no hidden refresh, no Git mutation in RepoBrief core, no review/runtime correctness claim.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: Relevant tests/checks are run, or a precise blocker/gap is recorded.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

acceptance.assertion: The output states what the evidence does not establish.
acceptance.verifier: PR, self-review, tests, or stop report

metadata.outcome: Verified existing Lenskit read-only RepoBrief access and MCP boundary surfaces on current main.

verified_acceptance.rbv1-t010-scope-bound: Existing Lenskit main exposes read-only RepoBrief resource/tool-equivalent surfaces and MCP boundary documentation without hidden broadening.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t010-boundary-preserved: Boundary docs and access tests preserve no refresh, no Git mutation, no shell, no PR actions and no runtime/review correctness claim.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t010-tests-or-gap: Targeted MCP boundary and read-only access tests passed: 41 total.
verified_acceptance.rbv1-t010-non-claims: MCP/read-only access does not establish truth, correctness, completeness, runtime behavior, test sufficiency, regression absence, repo understanding, claim truth or forensic readiness.

scope_clarification_2026_07_08.verified_scope: read-only RepoBrief access layer, CLI/resource-equivalent helpers, source citation/resolved evidence query tests, and MCP boundary documentation
